mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO approval_record (business_type, business_id, step_order, approver_id, approver_name, is_pending, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.businessType}, #{item.businessId}, #{item.stepOrder}, #{item.approverId}, #{item.approverName}, 1, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE approval_record SET action = #{action}, comment = #{comment}, is_pending = #{isPending}, operate_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM approval_record WHERE approver_id = #{approverId} AND is_pending = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM approval_record WHERE approver_id = #{approverId} AND is_pending = 0 ORDER BY operate_time DESC
